# warm start                   = PRE_SOLUTION

# max CP Inc. degree           = 10

# Column added to MP           = 40

# use greedy for vehicle portion  = false
# use zones for vehicle portion  = false
# number of pickups is limited  = true

# Sorting mode of columns      = REDUCED_COST

# solve Time Limit             = 300
# populate Time Limit          = 200
# MIP Gap                      = 0
